channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Thika Mother Bids Farewell to Son After Retrieving Body from Mortuary
item.description: A grieving mother from Kiganjo, Thika, Kiambu county, finally retrieved the body of her Form Three son, Zakayo Analo Jimmy, who died under mysterious circumstances at Gatamaiyu Senior School. The boy'...

item.title: Top Recommended Carry-On Luggage for 2026 Travel
item.description: Whether you're heading out for a weekend getaway or embarking on an international adventure, having high-quality carry-on luggage can make your travels smoother and more enjoyable. Global News' The Cu...

item.title: Ethan Sanders secures Raiders victory over Manly with first NRL field goal
item.description: In a thrilling NRL clash at Brookvale, the Canberra Raiders narrowly defeated the Manly Sea Eagles 29-28 in golden point, thanks to Ethan Sanders' remarkable first-ever NRL field goal. The young halfb...

item.title: Amit Shah inaugurates exhibition on new criminal laws in Haridwar, Uttarakhand
item.description: In Haridwar, Union Home Minister Amit Shah inaugurated a state-level exhibition on 'Nootan Nyaya Sanhita' at Bairagi Camp, organised by the Uttarakhand government. The exhibition aims to create awaren...

item.title: Two Policemen Killed and 31 Injured in Wana IED Explosion
item.description: In Lower South Waziristan, a tragic incident took place on Saturday in Wana's Rustam Bazaar area, where two policemen lost their lives and 31 others, including five policemen and 26 civilians, sustain...

item.title: Scientists Describe 309 New Freshwater Fish Species Across the Globe
item.description: Freshwater ecosystems, despite covering less than 1% of the Earth's surface, are teeming with life, much of which remains undiscovered. In 2025 alone, researchers described 309 new freshwater fish spe...

item.title: Japanese conman sentenced for attempting to traffic nuclear materials and narcotics internationally
item.description: Takeshi Ebisawa, a 62-year-old Japanese man, has been sentenced to 20 years in prison in New York after pleading guilty to multiple charges including conspiracy to traffic nuclear materials and intern...

item.title: Why Kenyan Businesses Must Embrace Sustainability to Withstand Global Shocks
item.description: The recent flare-up of conflict in the Middle East is not just a far-off issue; it has real economic consequences for Kenya and East Africa. Oil price spikes, shipping delays, currency pressure, and r...

item.title: US Faces Growing Risks in Escalating Iran Conflict
item.description: After one week of the US-Israel conflict with Iran, things dey get complicated well-well for President Trump. Even with the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei and strong attacks on their milita...

item.title: Former knife offender joins anti-knife crime art installation to warn young people of consequences
item.description: A new multimedia art installation called Re-claim, created by artist Eugene Ankomah at the Salmon Youth Centre in Bermondsey, southeast London, confronts visitors with the harsh realities of knife cri...

item.title: Challenges in Implementing Vessel Monitoring System to Combat IUU Fishing in the Philippines
item.description: The Philippines continues to struggle with enforcing the vessel monitoring system (VMS) for fishing vessels, a key measure against illegal, unreported, and unregulated (IUU) fishing. Mandated under th...

item.title: Reflections on Building a Simple To-Do List App with AI
item.description: Edmund Tadros shares his experience developing a basic 'to-do list' app with the help of AI, spending roughly $200 and eight hours on the project. As someone who meticulously tracks tasks and projects...

item.title: Nintendo Files Lawsuit Seeking Refunds With Interest on Tariffs Ruled Unlawful by Supreme Court
item.description: Nintendo of America has filed a lawsuit in the U.S. Court of International Trade against the federal government, demanding refunds plus interest on tariffs it paid under executive orders issued by Pre...

item.title: Philosophical Roots of Modern Authenticity: Insights from Rousseau and Heidegger
item.description: The article explores how authenticity has become a central value for today's youth, particularly Gen Z, with a Ernst & Young report showing over 90% prioritizing being true to oneself above other valu...

item.title: Igbo Youths Support Kalu, Say NYSC and Law School Claims Are Politically Driven
item.description: The Union of Igbo Youths don show full support for Benjamin Okezie Kalu, wey be Deputy Speaker of the House of Representatives, dey reject claims wey dey question him NYSC certificate and Nigerian Law...

item.title: Analysis of LPG Price Hike Amid Iran-Israel Tensions and Global Factors
item.description: Due to ongoing tensions in the Middle East between Iran and Israel, there has been concern over potential disruptions in fuel supply. However, government sources have clarified that while there may be...

item.title: Iran Signals Possible De-escalation Amid Continued Strikes and Leadership Uncertainty
item.description: The conflict between Iran and its Gulf neighbors intensified even as Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian delivered what appeared to be the country's first statement hinting at de-escalation. Pezeshkia...

item.title: US Foreign Policy and Escalating Conflicts in West Asia and Beyond
item.description: The article critically examines the United States’ approach to foreign policy under President Donald Trump, arguing that the US has a long-standing pattern of initiating foreign conflicts when facing ...

item.title: Australian Paralympian Josh Hanlon Injured During Alpine Skiing Event at Cortina 2026
item.description: Australian para-alpine skier Josh Hanlon had a tough start at the 2026 Winter Paralympics in Cortina. During his first event, the men's alpine downhill sitting race, Hanlon lost control on a challengi...

item.title: Iran-US-Israel War Enters Second Week Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Eight days into the ongoing conflict between the United States–Israel coalition and Iran, the war continues to be dominated by missile, drone, and proxy attacks, spreading across multiple fronts from ...
